Name: Azure AppConfig KV - Retrieve Values
Description:
This step retrieves one or more key/values from an Azure App Configuration store and creates [output variables](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables) for each value retrieved. These values can be used in other deployment or runbook process steps.

You can retrieve individual keys that match a specific name and you can choose a custom output variable name for each key.

Wildcard search is also supported using the `*` notation in the **Key Names** parameter. Note: Combining a wildcard search with custom output variable names is not supported.

Authentication is performed using an Azure Service Principal.

---

**Required:** 
- An Azure account with permissions to retrieve key/values from the Azure App Config store.
- The `az` CLI on the target or worker. If the CLI can't be found, the step will fail. 

Notes:

- Tested on Octopus `2024.1` using az version `2.38.0`
- Tested with both Windows PowerShell and PowerShell Core (on Linux).

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.AzureAccount
Parameters.Label: Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: An Azure account with permissions to retrieve values from the Azure App Config store

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.ConfigStoreName
Parameters.Label: Config Store Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the Azure App Configuration store. Provide this or the **Config store endpoint**.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.ConfigStoreEndpoint
Parameters.Label: Config Store Endpoint
Parameters.HelpText: The endpoint for the Azure App Configuration Store. Provide this or the **Config store name**.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.RetrievalMethod
Parameters.Label: Retrieval Method
Parameters.HelpText:
Choose how the step calls the az cli. Either:
- `All`: Retrieve all configuration values in one call
- `Individually`: Retrieve configuration values in multiple calls; one for each key specified in the **Key Names** parameter.

Default: `All`

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.KeyNames
Parameters.Label: Key Names
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the names of the keys to be returned from Azure App Configuration in the format `KeyName | OutputVariableName` where:

- `KeyName` is the key to retrieve. Wildcards are supported by adding `*` at the end of the key name.
- `OutputVariableName` is the _optional_ Octopus [output variable](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables) name to store the key's value in. *If this value isn't specified, an output name will be generated dynamically*.

**Note:** Multiple keys can be retrieved by entering each one on a new line. Note: Combining a wildcard search with custom output variable names is not supported.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.Labels
Parameters.Label: Labels
Parameters.HelpText:
Labels are an attribute on keys. Provide one or more labels in the format `label1,label2` to retrieve only selected keys that are tagged with those labels.

**Note:** You can include both label values *and* specify key names if you want.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.SaveAsSensitiveVariables
Parameters.Label: Save sensitive output variables
Parameters.HelpText: Set the Octopus [output variables](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables) to Sensitive values. Default: `False`.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.SuppressWarnings
Parameters.Label: Suppress warnings
Parameters.HelpText: Suppress warnings from being written to the task log. For example, when a supplied key can't be found in the Azure App Configuration store.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.TreatWarningsAsErrors
Parameters.Label: Treat Warnings as Errors
Parameters.HelpText: Treats warnings as errors. If enabled, the **Suppress Warnings** parameter is ignored.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.CreateAppSettingsJson
Parameters.Label: Create AppSettings JSON
Parameters.HelpText: Create an Azure App Service AppSettings JSON output variable called `AppSettingsJson`. This can be useful when using the Octopus **Azure App Service** step and you want to dynamically create the JSON app settings.

Parameters.Name: Azure.AppConfig.KV.RetrieveValues.PrintVariableNames
Parameters.Label: Print output variable names
Parameters.HelpText: Write out the Octopus [output variable](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables) names to the task log. Default: `False`.
